global_description: A small, compact songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly olive-gray upper body and pale underparts. The bird features a faint white eyebrow stripe above the eye and a short, pointed bill. Its wings and tail are subtly edged with lighter tones.

part_details.head: Rounded with a faint white eyebrow stripe and olive-gray crown.
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, olive-gray on top with pale underparts.
part_details.wings: Short with subtle lighter edges, matching the olive-gray body.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly rounded, edged with lighter tones.
part_details.bill: Short, pointed, and slightly curved, suitable for insect foraging.

spatial_relations: The faint white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye.
The short tail extends from the rounded body.
The short, pointed bill protrudes from the front of the head.
